## What does this change?

<!-- A few sentences or a short list. -->

## Why?

<!-- What problem does this solve? Link to an issue if relevant. -->

## How is it tested?

<!--
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual test plan in the PR description
- [ ] Screenshot/GIF for UI changes
-->

## Risk / rollback

<!-- If something goes wrong, how do we revert? Feature flag, migration, etc. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (or the change doesn't need new tests)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if user-visible)
